fixes_from_user_screenshot: Canvas forced to 350px desktop and 330px mobile to remove excessive empty graph area
Graph lanes now computed from canvas height for balanced layout
Moved audio on/off buttons immediately below f1, f2, and volume controls
Renamed buttons to เปิดเสียงบีตส์ / ปิดเสียง
Default f2 changed to 447 Hz so beat frequency starts at 7 Hz
f1 and f2 are constrained to differ by no more than 10 Hz
